mapper.sql: order_id, order_item, split_no, pco_item, split_type, modelno, qty_do, qty, qty_in, qty_out, associate_no, status, status_desc, status_info, wm_order_id, inventory_id, inventory_table, wl_date, warehouse_code, estimated_delivery_day, reliability, modify_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_status_view
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_status_view (order_id, order_item, split_no, pco_item, split_type, modelno, qty_do, qty, qty_in, qty_out, associate_no, status, status_desc, status_info, wm_order_id, inventory_id, inventory_table, wl_date, warehouse_code, estimated_delivery_day, reliability, modify_time) values (#{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyDo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inventoryTable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{estimatedDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dbo.order_status_view
order_id,
order_item,
split_no,
pco_item,
split_type,
modelno,
qty_do,
qty,

status_info,
wm_order_id,
inventory_id,
inventory_table,
wl_date,
warehouse_code,
estimated_delivery_day,
reliability,
modify_time,

mapper.update:
update dbo.order_status_view
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_type = #{record.splitType,jdbcType=CHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty_do = #{record.qtyDo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_in = #{record.qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_out = #{record.qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER},
associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status_desc = #{record.statusDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status_info = #{record.statusInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wm_order_id = #{record.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventory_table = #{record.inventoryTable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
estimated_delivery_day = #{record.estimatedDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE},
reliability = #{record.reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.order_status_view set order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_type = #{record.splitType,jdbcType=CHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty_do = #{record.qtyDo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_in = #{record.qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_out = #{record.qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER}, associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_desc = #{record.statusDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_info = #{record.statusInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wm_order_id = #{record.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventory_table = #{record.inventoryTable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, estimated_delivery_day = #{record.estimatedDeliveryDay,jdbcType=DATE}, reliability = #{record.reliability,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
